name: Grilled New Potatoes with Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes on stove top in water to cover or in microwave oven on HIGH (1000W) until almost tender. Drain potatoes.
2. Toss with garlic, rosemary, and olive oil. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Can be prepared up to this point and refrigerated. To grill, divide potatoes in half. Place each batch in a single layer between large pieces of heavy-duty foil (or double thickness regular foil).
4. Bring up ends of foil to close airtight. Puncture several holes in each package.
5. Place on grill rack over hot coals, turning several times, until cooked, about 7 minutes total.
6. Unwrap and serve immediately.
Makes 6 servings. Puncturing the foil with holes allows some of the smokiness to permeate the potatoes.
